stories.title: Lotto 6aus49 am Mittwoch: Das sind die Gewinnzahlen vom 22.7.2026
stories.summary: The Lotto 6aus49 jackpot of 50 million euros went unclaimed in Wednesday’s draw. The winning numbers were 3, 5, 10, 14, 25, 49 with a Superzahl of 3. The next draw takes place on Saturday, with the jackpot rolling over. Players can check results and place new bets online.

stories.title: L'Allemagne autorise un projet nucléaire russo-français controversé

Controversial due to Russian involvement amid accusations of hybrid war. German authorities say risks can be managed, no EU sanctions to block it. Sentence 4: The project aims to supply Soviet-designed reactors still operating in Europe.

stories.title: FSD : la France dit officiellement non à la conduite 100 % autonome de Tesla
stories.summary: La France refuse l’autorisation de la conduite entièrement autonome supervisée de Tesla, jugée trop dangereuse. Le système, déjà homologué aux Pays-Bas et dans d'autres pays européens, pourrait dépasser les limites de vitesse sans intervention du conducteur. Le ministre des Transports, Philippe Tabarot, souligne des risques liés à la sécurité et à l’attention du conducteur. Une révision technique est nécessaire avant toute déploiement en France.

stories.title: Le PSG a fait une grosse offre à Ferran Torres
stories.summary: Le héros inattendu. Dimanche soir, Ferran Torres a inscrit le but de la victoire 1 à 0 lors de la finale de la Coupe du Monde 2026. Critiqué par certains au pays durant le tournoi, l’Espagnol de 26 ans s’est offert la plus belle des revanches. Après avoir soulevé le trophée et fêté ce titre avec la Roja, le natif de Foios va pouvoir profiter d’un peu de repos avant de reprendre le chemin des entraînements. Il reste à savoir dans quel club ce sera. Car son avenir se joue en coulisses depuis quelques semaines. Ce qui n’était pas forcément dans les plans du FC Barcelone, club avec lequel il est sous contrat jusqu’en 2027.

stories.title: Princess Charlene Glitters in a Gold Elie Saab Gown at Monaco’s Red Cross Ball
stories.summary: We need to write a punchy, informative 3-4 sentence brief (about 60-90 words). Lead with most important fact. Include key who/what/where and number, date or consequence that matters. Add one line of context or what happens next. Prefer facts that agree across outlets; ignore contradictions. No repeated words or sentences. No markdown, hashtags, brackets, quotes, emojis. No mention of "the article" or outlet names. Plain text only. We need to extract facts that both sources agree. From townandcountrymag.com: Princess Charlene and Prince Albert headlined Monaco’s Red Cross Ball on Saturday, one of the marquee events on the principality’s summer social calendar. Charlene wore a luminous one-shoulder, column design by Elie Saab. Some of her recent looks from the Lebanese designer include a shimmering silver gown she wore to the Rose Ball in March as well as a white embroidered midi dress to Pope Leo’s inauguration in 2025. The Princely couple were joined on the red carpet by Camille Gottlieb, daughter of Princess Stéphanie and granddaughter of Grace Kelly, dressed in a soft yellow Elisabetta Franchi gown. (At last year’s Red Cross Ball, Gottlieb wore another Elisabetta Franchi gown that was a direct homage to Kelly’s iconic appearance in Alfred Hitchcock’s Rear Window.) The Red Cross Ball, held annually at the Salle des Étoiles in Monte Carlo, is among Monaco’s most prominent annual galas.

stories.title: World Matchplay Darts: Updates, video, analysis, scores, commentary with Gerwyn Price, James Wade, Gian van Veen in action
stories.summary: Cameron Menzies moved closer to a major title after upsetting Luke Humphries in the 2026 Betfred World Matchplay. The victory featured a remarkable 170 checkout to secure his place in the next round. Menzies now faces Ross Smith on Wednesday night as the tournament continues. Smith enters the match following a dominant 10-6 win over Kevin Doets.

stories.title: Obama Takes Shot at Vance Over Marriage ‘Hypocrisy’
stories.summary: Barack Obama criticized JD Vance for advocating restrictive immigration policies while being married to Usha Vance, whose parents immigrated from India. Speaking on a podcast with Malcolm Gladwell, Obama highlighted Vance’s speech pushing to end birthright citizenship despite his own family’s immigrant background. The former president called out the hypocrisy in Vance’s rhetoric. Obama’s remarks come amid ongoing debates over immigration and national identity.

stories.title: Gruesome images in D4vd hearing are 'worst nightmare' for Celeste Rivas Hernandez's family
stories.summary: The user wants me to write a 3-4 sentence news brief (60-90 words) based on two sources reporting the same event. stories.title: Pesticidi: richiamati riso Carnaroli, riso Roma integrale e kit pasta e fagioli
stories.summary: Three Italian food products are being recalled due to pesticide contamination. The Ministry of Health has recalled a 1 kg bag of Carnaroli rice (lot 13022036, best before March 31, 2027) for exceeding tetrametrina limits. A 1 kg bag of Roma integrale rice (Riso Vignola brand) is also recalled for containing banned clorpirifos. Additionally, a pasta and beans kit is being recalled for possible glyphosate traces in dried beans. Consumers are advised to return affected products to point of purchase.

stories.title: iPhone 18 news, leaks, and rumors: Release date, iPhone 18 Pro details, more info
stories.summary: Apple is expected to unveil its iPhone 18 lineup in September 2026, including the first-ever foldable iPhone Ultra, following its tradition of September announcements. The lineup will feature the iPhone 18 Pro, 18 Pro Max, and rumored iPhone Air, with the standard iPhone 18 and 18e likely arriving early next year. Apple’s new iOS 27, featuring Siri AI as a standalone app, will debut alongside the devices. Analysts anticipate further leaks ahead of the launch.

stories.title: 2 weeks after a Mississippi football player’s death, many questions loom
stories.summary: Nineteen-year-old Mississippi football player Nolan Wells died 16 days ago after a Fourth of July boat trip to Horn Island left him missing. His body was recovered July 6 facedown in the water by a National Park Service agent. Wells, a wide receiver at Southwest Mississippi Community College, was with friends who returned safely. Authorities continue investigating the cause of death as his family prepares to lay him to rest.

stories.title: Il faudra l'aval de l'employeur ou de France Travail avant de suivre une formation: le gouvernement veut (encore) réformer le CPF et cela suscite déjà des remous
stories.summary: Le gouvernement propose de réformer le CPF en exigeant l'aval de l'employeur ou de France Travail avant de suivre une formation, suscitant des critiques. Cette mesure, évoquée par le ministre du Travail le 16 juillet, vise à encadrer davantage les formations en lien avec les besoins du marché du travail. Les syndicats, dont la CFDT, s'opposent à cette restriction, jugeant cela contraire à l'esprit de la réforme initiale. Le texte du budget 2027 pourrait officialiser ces changements, après un débat en cours.

stories.title: The iPhone 18 Pro's Rumored Camera Upgrade, Explained
stories.summary: Apple’s iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max will introduce a first-of-its-kind variable-aperture camera, expected to launch in September 2026. The upgrade aims to improve video quality in bright conditions by mechanically adjusting light intake, reducing unnatural sharpness in outdoor footage. Production began in July 2026 alongside Apple’s debut foldable iPhone. The move follows the iPhone 17 Pro’s 2025 launch, which featured a triple 48MP camera system and improved thermal performance.

stories.title: Casemiro: Inter Miami being investigated for tampering after signing ex-Manchester United midfielder
stories.summary: Major League Soccer is investigating Inter Miami for potential tampering after signing Brazil midfielder Casemiro. The 34-year-old, a free agent from Manchester United, joins Miami on a deal through 2027 with a 2029 extension option. The league is reviewing whether Inter Miami acquired Casemiro’s discovery rights from the LA Galaxy, which held them. The investigation continues as Miami prepares for his debut pending visa approval.

stories.title: Sony releases one last trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day
stories.summary: Sony released the final trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day on July 22, teasing a high-stakes battle against a shapeshifting villain. The trailer confirms Sadie Sink’s undisclosed role as the main antagonist, with Zabryna Guevara returning as Sheila Rivera and Florence Pugh reprising Yelena. Highlights include Spidey’s emotional reunion with MJ, Hulk’s explosive cameo, and a city-wide swing through New York. The film, wrapping up Holland’s trilogy, hits theaters December 12.

stories.title: Man, 30s, dies after being struck by van in Co Kilkenny
stories.summary: A man in his 30s died after being struck by a van on the R693 near Arigan Bridge, Cooleshal, Freshford, Co Kilkenny at 9.30am on Wednesday, 22 July 2026. The pedestrian was pronounced dead at the scene and his body taken to University Hospital Waterford for a post-mortem. The road was temporarily closed but has since reopened. Gardaí are appealing for witnesses or dash-cam footage from drivers travelling the route between 9am and 9.30am.

stories.title: Zendaya faces backlash for wearing ancient Iranian jewellery at Odyssey event
stories.summary: The user wants a 3-4 sentence news brief (60-90 words) based on two sources reporting the same event: Zendaya wearing ancient Iranian/Kurdish jewelry at an Odyssey film event in London, sparking backlash. Key facts agreed across both sources: - Zendaya wore earrings at a London photocall for Christopher Nolan's film "The Odyssey" (she plays Athena) - The earrings incorporate gold plaques from the Ziwiye/Zêwye hoard (dated ~700BC/first millennium BC) - The hoard was discovered in 1947 in northwestern Iran (present-day Eastern Kurdistan) - The pieces belong to Barron London gallery, originally mounted by jeweler Glenn Spiro in 2018 - Archaeologists/critics condemn using culturally significant artifacts as fashion accessories for film promotion - Controversy involves cultural heritage, provenance, and ethics Need to lead with most important fact: Zendaya wore ancient artifacts as earrings at film event, sparking backlash. Must include: who (Zendaya), what (wore ancient Iranian/Kurdish gold plaques as earrings), where (London photocall for "The Odyssey"), key number/date (700BC/first millennium BC, 1947 discovery), consequence (backlash from archaeologists over cultural appropriation/ethics). One line of context: what happens next or broader debate. Word count: 60-90 words. 3-4 sentences. No markdown, no quotes, no repeated words, neutral tone.

stories.title: Chapecoense x Flamengo: onde assistir ao vivo, horário e escalações
stories.summary: Chapecoense hosts Flamengo at 21:30 Wednesday in the 19th round of the Brasileirão at Arena Condá. Chapecoense sits last with nine points from 18 games, while Flamengo trails Palmeiras by seven points and fields Léo Pereira and Plata after their World Cup return. The game will be shown live on Globo, Sportv and Premiere. Both clubs returned from the World Cup pause, with Chapecoense struggling to avoid relegation and Flamengo aiming to narrow the gap to the leader.

stories.title: ‘Terrifying’: Woman says landlord was hiding behind wall of Wexford holiday home
stories.summary: A family staying in a Wexford holiday home booked via Booking.com said the owner was hiding behind a wall after they left for a party.

stories.title: Shownieuws creëert verwarring over lot Greetje in Urk!: 'Doet echt niet meer mee'
stories.summary: Greetje Hakvoort’s role in the reality series Urk! remains unclear after Shownieuws suggested she would no longer appear. Both SBS6 and Hakvoort denied the claim, with Teun Kapitein stating she is still filming. The show insists her departure is not planned, leaving the conflicting statements unresolved. The new season’s premiere may provide clarity.

stories.title: Sporting Cristal x RB Bragantino, pelos playoffs das oitavas de final da CONMEBOL Sudamericana: horário, equipes e como assistir ao jogo
stories.summary: Sporting Cristal will make its CONMEBOL Sudamericana playoff debut against RB Bragantino, and the winner will meet Atlético Mineiro in the round of 16. Cristal, third in Group F of the Libertadores, appointed Roberto Mosquera as coach for a fourth stint and remains unbeaten since his arrival, while Bragantino, second in Group H, recovered several injured players, including top scorer Isidro Pitta. The match is scheduled for the upcoming fixture later this week.

stories.title: Lego’s Donkey Kong arcade machine lets Mario jump endless barrels — Miyamoto is reportedly happy
stories.summary: A Lego Donkey Kong arcade machine has been created, priced at $200, featuring a working joystick and button to control Mario's movement and jumping. The game includes an endless series of barrels for Mario to jump, utilizing the same original barrels first released in 1989 for Lego's pirate sets. The machine is said to have won the favor of Mario creator Shigeru Miyamoto. The set's designer, Carl Merriam, has a history of creating nostalgic Lego sets.

stories.title: China's Moonshot AI stole from Anthropic, Trump tech adviser says
stories.summary: China's Moonshot AI has been accused of stealing capabilities from top US AI models, including Anthropic's Fable AI, through a process called distillation. US President Donald Trump's Science and Technology adviser Michael Kratsios claims Moonshot gained access to restricted Nvidia servers to train its models. The alleged theft occurred for the development of Moonshot's K3 model, which was unveiled last week and is said to rival top US technology. The US government is now investigating the claims.

stories.title: Elliot Page presenta la fidanzata Julia Shiplett: chi è la comica al suo fianco sul red carpet di The Odyssey
stories.summary: Elliot Page made his first public red carpet appearance with fiancée Julia Shiplett at The Odyssey premiere in Los Angeles on November 12. Shiplett, a Chicago-born comedian, writer and actress, gained fame through her viral sketches and roles in Overcompensating and Crashing. The couple, who usually keep their relationship private, shared photos from the event on social media. Page’s next project is the upcoming film The Odyssey.

stories.title: Robert Lewandowski prepares for Chicago Fire debut
stories.summary: Robert Lewandowski is set to make his Chicago Fire debut on Wednesday against Inter Miami CF. The Polish striker, one of the greatest of his generation, joins the Fire after an illustrious European career with Borussia Dortmund, Bayern Munich, and FC Barcelona. He'll wear the No. 9 jersey as Chicago looks to build on a strong first season under head coach Gregg Berhalter. Lewandowski's highly anticipated debut comes after a postponed match against Vancouver Whitecaps FC due to poor air quality.

stories.title: Inter Miami vs Chicago Fire: Preview, How to Watch It on TV, & Prediction Lineups
stories.summary: Tonight, Inter Miami faces the Chicago Fire in a highly anticipated matchup at Soldier Field in Chicago, Illinois. Eight Inter Miami players, including Lionel Messi, will be absent due to injuries or suspensions. The Chicago Fire will also be missing three players, with Mbekezeli Mbokazi listed as questionable. The match is part of the MLS second half of the regular season, with Inter Miami seeking to bounce back from significant absences.

stories.title: Where to Find a Commonwealth Games 2026 Livestream in the U.S. to Watch the Event for Free
stories.summary: The 2026 Commonwealth Games will take place in Glasgow, Scotland from July 23 to August 2, featuring thousands of athletes from over 70 nations. The event will be livestreamed for free in the US on CBC, Canada's national public broadcaster, using a virtual private network like ExpressVPN or NordVPN. Viewers can set their location to Canada to access the stream. The Games will air live and as nightly highlights on various channels in Australia and the UK.

stories.title: Even camels can't cope: Africa's ships of the desert hit by rising temperatures
stories.summary: Rising temperatures in Africa's Afar region have taken a toll on camel herders, with 40-year-old Ali Umer reporting eight camel calf deaths in just one month due to extreme heat. The region is one of the hottest and driest places on Earth, where nomads lead camel caravans carrying salt through the desert. Camels are suffering from blisters, watery eyes, and skin burns, with herders noting drastic changes in temperature and wind patterns. Herders are struggling to cope with the increasing heat.

stories.title: World Matchplay 2026: Cameron Menzies receives medical care, Gerwyn Price, James Wade and Gian van Veen win
stories.summary: Cameron Menzies was forced to forfeit his World Matchplay second-round match against Ross Smith in Blackpool on Wednesday due to high blood pressure, which caused him to feel dizzy and faint. Menzies was cleared by medics backstage but unable to return to the stage. Meanwhile, Gerwyn Price and Gian van Veen secured quarter-final spots with dominant wins. Price came from behind to defeat Ross Cross 11-5, while van Veen edged Wessel Nijman in a tie-break.

stories.title: talkSPORT tips – Best football bets and expert advice for Wednesday 22 July
stories.summary: The World Cup break ends as Major League Soccer resumes Wednesday with key qualifiers across Europe. New England Revolution face Toronto at 20/23 odds after the visitors’ nine-match MLS winless streak. Inter Miami host Chicago Fire in a high-scoring clash, with Hugo Cuypers to score and over 2.5 goals expected at 5/1. Eastern Conference leaders Nashville are the only team to avoid defeat at New England this season.

stories.title: Vincenzo Italiano: "Çok kaliteli bir oyuncu, beni şaşırttı"
stories.summary: Beşiktaş Teknik Direktörü Vincenzo Italiano, UEFA Avrupa Ligi'nde Midtjylland maçı öncesi takımın hazır olduğunu ve sahaya Beşiktaş kimliğini yansıtan bir ekip çıkarmayı hedeflediklerini açıkladı. İtalyan teknik adam, milli takımlarda yer alan oyuncular nedeniyle eksik kadroyla başladıkları sezonu öncesi kampını değerlendirdi. "Son 10 gündür tam kadro çalışıyoruz ve bu süreci çok verimli geçirdik" diyen Italiano, oyuncularının sahada istediklerini uygulayacağına inandığını belirtti. Avrupa kupalarının heyecanını vurgulayan İtalyan, takımın yoluna devam etmek istediğini ifade etti.

stories.title: Elon Musk says Grok Imagine will make ‘historically accurate’ AI adaptation of Homer’s Odyssey
stories.summary: Elon Musk's AI platform Grok Imagine will create a historically accurate adaptation of Homer's Odyssey. The project follows the success of Christopher Nolan's film, which Musk has criticized for its casting. A three-minute clip of footage generated by Grok Imagine has been shared, showing a scene between Odysseus and the nymph Calypso. The new adaptation is expected to be released before the end of the year.

stories.title: Inter Miami CF - Chicago Fire w MLS. Relacja na żywo
stories.summary: Inter Miami CF defeated Chicago Fire 3-2 in a Major League Soccer match on July 26. Preston Plambeck scored the winning goal in stoppage time, capping a late comeback. Sergio Reguilon received a yellow card in added minutes as Chicago nearly equalized but failed to convert. Inter Miami next faces CF Montreal on the same day.

stories.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
stories.summary: The US and Saudi Arabia have signed a landmark nuclear deal, a "peaceful nuclear co-operation agreement," allowing Saudi Arabia to develop a civilian nuclear program. The deal includes a bilateral safeguards agreement and could provide great access for American companies in the Saudi nuclear energy program. The agreement is expected to be a decades-long, multi-billion-dollar partnership. The US Department of Energy will now review the deal's terms before it takes effect.

stories.title: Canada's 'powerful' dairy sector is in Trump's trade crosshairs
stories.summary: US President Donald Trump has targeted Canada's dairy sector with a 50% tariff on $20 billion worth of Canadian goods, citing the country's supply management system as an irritant. The system sets production quotas, pricing, and import quotas on dairy, eggs, and poultry. Canadian politicians, including Quebec Premier Christine Fréchette, have indicated that dairy supply management is non-negotiable. The US tariff is set to take effect in August.

stories.title: Republican Lawmaker Urges Charges Against Jack Smith
stories.summary: The criminal referral could provide a catalyst for a prosecution of Mr. Smith, who as special counsel became a top target of the president’s retribution campaign.

stories.title: Three Airports Plan to Ditch T.S.A. Agents Amid Push for Private Security
stories.summary: The airports have opted in to the agency’s new security model, an agency spokesperson confirmed on Wednesday. A union official said the move could jeopardize public safety.

stories.title: Houthis Claim Strikes on 2 Saudi Oil Tankers in Red Sea
stories.summary: The Saudi authorities had yet to confirm the hits, which would be the first attacks since the Iranian-backed Yemeni group announced a blockade on Saudi Arabia.

stories.title: Most sewage spills in England may be illegal, new research suggests
stories.summary: New research suggests that up to 86% of raw sewage spills in England may be illegal, with most occurring during non-heavy rain conditions. The analysis, covering over 350 storm overflow outlets, found that none of England's water companies performed well. The study's findings have significant implications for water companies serving over 30 million people. The UK's water regulator will likely face pressure to take action following these revelations.

stories.title: Hope for thousands of MS patients as 'life-changing' drug now on NHS in England
stories.summary: A life-changing treatment for thousands of multiple sclerosis patients is now available on the NHS in England. Up to 5,000 people could benefit each year from the new drug, fampridine, which boosts nerve signals to aid mobility. This breakthrough could enable patients to walk independently and live more independently. The NHS will now provide this treatment, previously only accessible privately, to those in need.

stories.title: Airport drop-off fees up by a third - here are the priciest
stories.summary: Drop-off fees at the UK's major airports have risen by a third on average since last summer, with 16 of the 20 busiest airports increasing their fees. London's Gatwick and Stansted airports now charge £10 for drop-offs, with Gatwick limiting the time to 10 minutes and Stansted offering 15 minutes. This move is part of Gatwick's efforts to encourage passengers to use trains and buses. The airport aims to have 54% of passengers using public transport by the time its second runway is operational.

stories.title: House Passes Defense Bill Amid Iran War Divide
stories.summary: Republicans pushed through the $1.15 trillion bill over opposition from Democrats, who said backing it was akin to embracing the war.

stories.title: McInnes glad of Rangers backing in appeal against ban
stories.summary: Rangers manager Derek McInnes has received a four-match touchline ban for criticizing a late penalty decision in a May match against Motherwell. The ban is in addition to an immediate three-game suspension with one game held until the end of the season. McInnes and Rangers plan to appeal the decision, which they argue was directed at the specific call rather than a broader criticism of officials. The appeal will be a key development in the case.

stories.title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
stories.summary: Google's parent company Alphabet reported negative free cash flow of $5.9 billion for the first time in at least a decade, due to spiraling costs of artificial intelligence infrastructure. The company's AI spending is expected to reach $205 billion this year, up from $190 billion. This surge in costs comes as Alphabet's combined quarterly revenue hit $119.8 billion, a 23% increase from last year. The company's stock fell 4% in after-hours trading.

stories.title: Yeon Sang-ho Returns to ‘Parasyte’ Universe With ‘Tamiya,’ Starring Shioli Kutsuna, at Netflix
stories.summary: South Korean filmmaker Yeon Sang-ho is returning to the "Parasyte" universe with a new live-action series, "Parasyte: Tamiya," starring Shioli Kutsuna, set to stream on Netflix in 2027. The series marks a collaboration between Netflix and Yeon, who also co-wrote the script with Ryu Yong-jae. This is Yeon's latest project following "Hellbound" and "Parasyte: The Grey." The series is expected to premiere next year.

stories.title: Clarity Act Mired In Debate Over Whether to Bar President From Selling Crypto
stories.summary: Democrats and Republicans are haggling about the Clarity Act, a major bill pushed by the crypto industry, as it moves closer to a Senate vote.

stories.title: Shaken, Soaked and Seasick: What It’s Like to Survive ‘The Odyssey’ in 4DX
stories.summary: A 3-hour screening of Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" in 4DX format left some viewers shaken and soaked. The immersive experience, featuring seat-rumbling and water-spritzing technology, is available at select theaters. Over 100 theaters worldwide have installed 4DX systems, offering a unique cinematic experience. Those who survived the ordeal reported seasick-like symptoms, a testament to the format's intense sensory stimulation.

stories.title: Tears and sleepless nights as Marshall and Adlington get Scotland flag honour
stories.summary: Scottish athletes Marshall and Adlington have been chosen to carry the Scotland flag at the Commonwealth Games. Marshall, a 59-year-old bowler, and Adlington, a 39-year-old judo gold medalist, will share the honor. The event is scheduled to take place at the Games, which will be a special moment for Marshall, who will be joined by his niece in the bowls team. The flag will be returned to the athletes after the ceremony, but they may have to compete for the first shot at it.

stories.title: Liverpool confident of signing Barcola - Thursday's gossip
stories.summary: Liverpool is confident of signing Paris St-Germain forward Bradley Barcola, a 23-year-old who impressed with four goal contributions at the World Cup with France this summer. The Reds aim to beat Arsenal and Bayern Munich to Barcola's signature. Talks are ongoing, but no official deal has been announced. The transfer would be a significant boost for Liverpool's attacking lineup.

stories.title: Alphabet Quadruples Profit to $112 Billion, Fueled by A.I. Investments
stories.summary: Google’s parent company, which has spent heavily on artificial intelligence, also showed growth across its businesses, particularly in cloud computing.

stories.title: What Were the Lotus-Eaters Eating in Homer’s ‘Odyssey’?
stories.summary: In Homer’s epic, Odysseus’s men eat something so powerful that they forget about home. Which plants could have produced such a soporific, narcotic and amnesiac effect?

stories.title: Target ultra-processed food to reduce obesity in Britain | Letter
stories.summary: A British health select committee report finds obesity is an engineered outcome, not a failure of willpower. The report highlights a flaw in decades of British food policy, specifically the "high in fat, salt or sugar" framework, which unfairly targets fat as a primary driver of weight gain. This framework has led to the replacement of fat with sugar in many products. The committee is now calling for a more targeted approach to reduce obesity in Britain.

offbeat.title: Lotto 6aus49 am Mittwoch: Das sind die Gewinnzahlen vom 22.7.2026
offbeat.summary: The Lotto 6aus49 jackpot of 50 million euros went unclaimed in Wednesday’s draw. The winning numbers were 3, 5, 10, 14, 25, 49 with a Superzahl of 3. The next draw takes place on Saturday, with the jackpot rolling over. Players can check results and place new bets online.

offbeat.title: L'Allemagne autorise un projet nucléaire russo-français controversé

Controversial due to Russian involvement amid accusations of hybrid war. German authorities say risks can be managed, no EU sanctions to block it. Sentence 4: The project aims to supply Soviet-designed reactors still operating in Europe.

offbeat.title: FSD : la France dit officiellement non à la conduite 100 % autonome de Tesla
offbeat.summary: La France refuse l’autorisation de la conduite entièrement autonome supervisée de Tesla, jugée trop dangereuse. Le système, déjà homologué aux Pays-Bas et dans d'autres pays européens, pourrait dépasser les limites de vitesse sans intervention du conducteur. Le ministre des Transports, Philippe Tabarot, souligne des risques liés à la sécurité et à l’attention du conducteur. Une révision technique est nécessaire avant toute déploiement en France.

offbeat.title: Le PSG a fait une grosse offre à Ferran Torres
offbeat.summary: Le héros inattendu. Dimanche soir, Ferran Torres a inscrit le but de la victoire 1 à 0 lors de la finale de la Coupe du Monde 2026. Critiqué par certains au pays durant le tournoi, l’Espagnol de 26 ans s’est offert la plus belle des revanches. Après avoir soulevé le trophée et fêté ce titre avec la Roja, le natif de Foios va pouvoir profiter d’un peu de repos avant de reprendre le chemin des entraînements. Il reste à savoir dans quel club ce sera. Car son avenir se joue en coulisses depuis quelques semaines. Ce qui n’était pas forcément dans les plans du FC Barcelone, club avec lequel il est sous contrat jusqu’en 2027.

offbeat.title: Princess Charlene Glitters in a Gold Elie Saab Gown at Monaco’s Red Cross Ball
offbeat.summary: We need to write a punchy, informative 3-4 sentence brief (about 60-90 words). Lead with most important fact. Include key who/what/where and number, date or consequence that matters. Add one line of context or what happens next. Prefer facts that agree across outlets; ignore contradictions. No repeated words or sentences. No markdown, hashtags, brackets, quotes, emojis. No mention of "the article" or outlet names. Plain text only. We need to extract facts that both sources agree. From townandcountrymag.com: Princess Charlene and Prince Albert headlined Monaco’s Red Cross Ball on Saturday, one of the marquee events on the principality’s summer social calendar. Charlene wore a luminous one-shoulder, column design by Elie Saab. Some of her recent looks from the Lebanese designer include a shimmering silver gown she wore to the Rose Ball in March as well as a white embroidered midi dress to Pope Leo’s inauguration in 2025. The Princely couple were joined on the red carpet by Camille Gottlieb, daughter of Princess Stéphanie and granddaughter of Grace Kelly, dressed in a soft yellow Elisabetta Franchi gown. (At last year’s Red Cross Ball, Gottlieb wore another Elisabetta Franchi gown that was a direct homage to Kelly’s iconic appearance in Alfred Hitchcock’s Rear Window.) The Red Cross Ball, held annually at the Salle des Étoiles in Monte Carlo, is among Monaco’s most prominent annual galas.

offbeat.title: World Matchplay Darts: Updates, video, analysis, scores, commentary with Gerwyn Price, James Wade, Gian van Veen in action
offbeat.summary: Cameron Menzies moved closer to a major title after upsetting Luke Humphries in the 2026 Betfred World Matchplay. The victory featured a remarkable 170 checkout to secure his place in the next round. Menzies now faces Ross Smith on Wednesday night as the tournament continues. Smith enters the match following a dominant 10-6 win over Kevin Doets.

offbeat.title: Obama Takes Shot at Vance Over Marriage ‘Hypocrisy’
offbeat.summary: Barack Obama criticized JD Vance for advocating restrictive immigration policies while being married to Usha Vance, whose parents immigrated from India. Speaking on a podcast with Malcolm Gladwell, Obama highlighted Vance’s speech pushing to end birthright citizenship despite his own family’s immigrant background. The former president called out the hypocrisy in Vance’s rhetoric. Obama’s remarks come amid ongoing debates over immigration and national identity.

offbeat.title: Gruesome images in D4vd hearing are 'worst nightmare' for Celeste Rivas Hernandez's family
offbeat.summary: The user wants me to write a 3-4 sentence news brief (60-90 words) based on two sources reporting the same event. offbeat.title: Pesticidi: richiamati riso Carnaroli, riso Roma integrale e kit pasta e fagioli
offbeat.summary: Three Italian food products are being recalled due to pesticide contamination. The Ministry of Health has recalled a 1 kg bag of Carnaroli rice (lot 13022036, best before March 31, 2027) for exceeding tetrametrina limits. A 1 kg bag of Roma integrale rice (Riso Vignola brand) is also recalled for containing banned clorpirifos. Additionally, a pasta and beans kit is being recalled for possible glyphosate traces in dried beans. Consumers are advised to return affected products to point of purchase.

offbeat.title: iPhone 18 news, leaks, and rumors: Release date, iPhone 18 Pro details, more info
offbeat.summary: Apple is expected to unveil its iPhone 18 lineup in September 2026, including the first-ever foldable iPhone Ultra, following its tradition of September announcements. The lineup will feature the iPhone 18 Pro, 18 Pro Max, and rumored iPhone Air, with the standard iPhone 18 and 18e likely arriving early next year. Apple’s new iOS 27, featuring Siri AI as a standalone app, will debut alongside the devices. Analysts anticipate further leaks ahead of the launch.

offbeat.title: 2 weeks after a Mississippi football player’s death, many questions loom
offbeat.summary: Nineteen-year-old Mississippi football player Nolan Wells died 16 days ago after a Fourth of July boat trip to Horn Island left him missing. His body was recovered July 6 facedown in the water by a National Park Service agent. Wells, a wide receiver at Southwest Mississippi Community College, was with friends who returned safely. Authorities continue investigating the cause of death as his family prepares to lay him to rest.

offbeat.title: Il faudra l'aval de l'employeur ou de France Travail avant de suivre une formation: le gouvernement veut (encore) réformer le CPF et cela suscite déjà des remous
offbeat.summary: Le gouvernement propose de réformer le CPF en exigeant l'aval de l'employeur ou de France Travail avant de suivre une formation, suscitant des critiques. Cette mesure, évoquée par le ministre du Travail le 16 juillet, vise à encadrer davantage les formations en lien avec les besoins du marché du travail. Les syndicats, dont la CFDT, s'opposent à cette restriction, jugeant cela contraire à l'esprit de la réforme initiale. Le texte du budget 2027 pourrait officialiser ces changements, après un débat en cours.

offbeat.title: The iPhone 18 Pro's Rumored Camera Upgrade, Explained
offbeat.summary: Apple’s iPhone 18 Pro and Pro Max will introduce a first-of-its-kind variable-aperture camera, expected to launch in September 2026. The upgrade aims to improve video quality in bright conditions by mechanically adjusting light intake, reducing unnatural sharpness in outdoor footage. Production began in July 2026 alongside Apple’s debut foldable iPhone. The move follows the iPhone 17 Pro’s 2025 launch, which featured a triple 48MP camera system and improved thermal performance.

offbeat.title: Casemiro: Inter Miami being investigated for tampering after signing ex-Manchester United midfielder
offbeat.summary: Major League Soccer is investigating Inter Miami for potential tampering after signing Brazil midfielder Casemiro. The 34-year-old, a free agent from Manchester United, joins Miami on a deal through 2027 with a 2029 extension option. The league is reviewing whether Inter Miami acquired Casemiro’s discovery rights from the LA Galaxy, which held them. The investigation continues as Miami prepares for his debut pending visa approval.

offbeat.title: Sony releases one last trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day
offbeat.summary: Sony released the final trailer for Spider-Man: Brand New Day on July 22, teasing a high-stakes battle against a shapeshifting villain. The trailer confirms Sadie Sink’s undisclosed role as the main antagonist, with Zabryna Guevara returning as Sheila Rivera and Florence Pugh reprising Yelena. Highlights include Spidey’s emotional reunion with MJ, Hulk’s explosive cameo, and a city-wide swing through New York. The film, wrapping up Holland’s trilogy, hits theaters December 12.

offbeat.title: Man, 30s, dies after being struck by van in Co Kilkenny
offbeat.summary: A man in his 30s died after being struck by a van on the R693 near Arigan Bridge, Cooleshal, Freshford, Co Kilkenny at 9.30am on Wednesday, 22 July 2026. The pedestrian was pronounced dead at the scene and his body taken to University Hospital Waterford for a post-mortem. The road was temporarily closed but has since reopened. Gardaí are appealing for witnesses or dash-cam footage from drivers travelling the route between 9am and 9.30am.

offbeat.title: Zendaya faces backlash for wearing ancient Iranian jewellery at Odyssey event
offbeat.summary: The user wants a 3-4 sentence news brief (60-90 words) based on two sources reporting the same event: Zendaya wearing ancient Iranian/Kurdish jewelry at an Odyssey film event in London, sparking backlash. Key facts agreed across both sources: - Zendaya wore earrings at a London photocall for Christopher Nolan's film "The Odyssey" (she plays Athena) - The earrings incorporate gold plaques from the Ziwiye/Zêwye hoard (dated ~700BC/first millennium BC) - The hoard was discovered in 1947 in northwestern Iran (present-day Eastern Kurdistan) - The pieces belong to Barron London gallery, originally mounted by jeweler Glenn Spiro in 2018 - Archaeologists/critics condemn using culturally significant artifacts as fashion accessories for film promotion - Controversy involves cultural heritage, provenance, and ethics Need to lead with most important fact: Zendaya wore ancient artifacts as earrings at film event, sparking backlash. One line of context: what happens next or broader debate. Word count: 60-90 words. 3-4 sentences. No markdown, no quotes, no repeated words, neutral tone.

offbeat.title: Chapecoense x Flamengo: onde assistir ao vivo, horário e escalações
offbeat.summary: Chapecoense hosts Flamengo at 21:30 Wednesday in the 19th round of the Brasileirão at Arena Condá. Chapecoense sits last with nine points from 18 games, while Flamengo trails Palmeiras by seven points and fields Léo Pereira and Plata after their World Cup return. The game will be shown live on Globo, Sportv and Premiere. Both clubs returned from the World Cup pause, with Chapecoense struggling to avoid relegation and Flamengo aiming to narrow the gap to the leader.

offbeat.title: ‘Terrifying’: Woman says landlord was hiding behind wall of Wexford holiday home
offbeat.summary: A family staying in a Wexford holiday home booked via Booking.com said the owner was hiding behind a wall after they left for a party.

offbeat.title: Shownieuws creëert verwarring over lot Greetje in Urk!: 'Doet echt niet meer mee'
offbeat.summary: Greetje Hakvoort’s role in the reality series Urk! remains unclear after Shownieuws suggested she would no longer appear. Both SBS6 and Hakvoort denied the claim, with Teun Kapitein stating she is still filming. The show insists her departure is not planned, leaving the conflicting statements unresolved. The new season’s premiere may provide clarity.

offbeat.title: Sporting Cristal x RB Bragantino, pelos playoffs das oitavas de final da CONMEBOL Sudamericana: horário, equipes e como assistir ao jogo
offbeat.summary: Sporting Cristal will make its CONMEBOL Sudamericana playoff debut against RB Bragantino, and the winner will meet Atlético Mineiro in the round of 16. Cristal, third in Group F of the Libertadores, appointed Roberto Mosquera as coach for a fourth stint and remains unbeaten since his arrival, while Bragantino, second in Group H, recovered several injured players, including top scorer Isidro Pitta. The match is scheduled for the upcoming fixture later this week.

offbeat.title: Elliot Page presenta la fidanzata Julia Shiplett: chi è la comica al suo fianco sul red carpet di The Odyssey
offbeat.summary: Elliot Page made his first public red carpet appearance with fiancée Julia Shiplett at The Odyssey premiere in Los Angeles on November 12. Shiplett, a Chicago-born comedian, writer and actress, gained fame through her viral sketches and roles in Overcompensating and Crashing. The couple, who usually keep their relationship private, shared photos from the event on social media. Page’s next project is the upcoming film The Odyssey.

offbeat.title: Robert Lewandowski prepares for Chicago Fire debut
offbeat.summary: Robert Lewandowski is set to make his Chicago Fire debut on Wednesday against Inter Miami CF. The Polish striker, one of the greatest of his generation, joins the Fire after an illustrious European career with Borussia Dortmund, Bayern Munich, and FC Barcelona. He'll wear the No. 9 jersey as Chicago looks to build on a strong first season under head coach Gregg Berhalter. Lewandowski's highly anticipated debut comes after a postponed match against Vancouver Whitecaps FC due to poor air quality.

offbeat.title: Inter Miami vs Chicago Fire: Preview, How to Watch It on TV, & Prediction Lineups
offbeat.summary: Tonight, Inter Miami faces the Chicago Fire in a highly anticipated matchup at Soldier Field in Chicago, Illinois. Eight Inter Miami players, including Lionel Messi, will be absent due to injuries or suspensions. The Chicago Fire will also be missing three players, with Mbekezeli Mbokazi listed as questionable. The match is part of the MLS second half of the regular season, with Inter Miami seeking to bounce back from significant absences.

offbeat.title: Even camels can't cope: Africa's ships of the desert hit by rising temperatures
offbeat.summary: Rising temperatures in Africa's Afar region have taken a toll on camel herders, with 40-year-old Ali Umer reporting eight camel calf deaths in just one month due to extreme heat. The region is one of the hottest and driest places on Earth, where nomads lead camel caravans carrying salt through the desert. Camels are suffering from blisters, watery eyes, and skin burns, with herders noting drastic changes in temperature and wind patterns. Herders are struggling to cope with the increasing heat.

offbeat.title: World Matchplay 2026: Cameron Menzies receives medical care, Gerwyn Price, James Wade and Gian van Veen win
offbeat.summary: Cameron Menzies was forced to forfeit his World Matchplay second-round match against Ross Smith in Blackpool on Wednesday due to high blood pressure, which caused him to feel dizzy and faint. Menzies was cleared by medics backstage but unable to return to the stage. Meanwhile, Gerwyn Price and Gian van Veen secured quarter-final spots with dominant wins. Price came from behind to defeat Ross Cross 11-5, while van Veen edged Wessel Nijman in a tie-break.

offbeat.title: talkSPORT tips – Best football bets and expert advice for Wednesday 22 July
offbeat.summary: The World Cup break ends as Major League Soccer resumes Wednesday with key qualifiers across Europe. New England Revolution face Toronto at 20/23 odds after the visitors’ nine-match MLS winless streak. Inter Miami host Chicago Fire in a high-scoring clash, with Hugo Cuypers to score and over 2.5 goals expected at 5/1. Eastern Conference leaders Nashville are the only team to avoid defeat at New England this season.

offbeat.title: Vincenzo Italiano: "Çok kaliteli bir oyuncu, beni şaşırttı"
offbeat.summary: Beşiktaş Teknik Direktörü Vincenzo Italiano, UEFA Avrupa Ligi'nde Midtjylland maçı öncesi takımın hazır olduğunu ve sahaya Beşiktaş kimliğini yansıtan bir ekip çıkarmayı hedeflediklerini açıkladı. İtalyan teknik adam, milli takımlarda yer alan oyuncular nedeniyle eksik kadroyla başladıkları sezonu öncesi kampını değerlendirdi. "Son 10 gündür tam kadro çalışıyoruz ve bu süreci çok verimli geçirdik" diyen Italiano, oyuncularının sahada istediklerini uygulayacağına inandığını belirtti. Avrupa kupalarının heyecanını vurgulayan İtalyan, takımın yoluna devam etmek istediğini ifade etti.

offbeat.title: Elon Musk says Grok Imagine will make ‘historically accurate’ AI adaptation of Homer’s Odyssey
offbeat.summary: Elon Musk's AI platform Grok Imagine will create a historically accurate adaptation of Homer's Odyssey. The project follows the success of Christopher Nolan's film, which Musk has criticized for its casting. A three-minute clip of footage generated by Grok Imagine has been shared, showing a scene between Odysseus and the nymph Calypso. The new adaptation is expected to be released before the end of the year.

offbeat.title: Inter Miami CF - Chicago Fire w MLS. Relacja na żywo
offbeat.summary: Inter Miami CF defeated Chicago Fire 3-2 in a Major League Soccer match on July 26. Preston Plambeck scored the winning goal in stoppage time, capping a late comeback. Sergio Reguilon received a yellow card in added minutes as Chicago nearly equalized but failed to convert. Inter Miami next faces CF Montreal on the same day.

offbeat.title: US signs landmark nuclear deal with Saudi Arabia
offbeat.summary: The US and Saudi Arabia have signed a landmark nuclear deal, a "peaceful nuclear co-operation agreement," allowing Saudi Arabia to develop a civilian nuclear program. The deal includes a bilateral safeguards agreement and could provide great access for American companies in the Saudi nuclear energy program. The agreement is expected to be a decades-long, multi-billion-dollar partnership. The US Department of Energy will now review the deal's terms before it takes effect.

offbeat.title: Canada's 'powerful' dairy sector is in Trump's trade crosshairs
offbeat.summary: US President Donald Trump has targeted Canada's dairy sector with a 50% tariff on $20 billion worth of Canadian goods, citing the country's supply management system as an irritant. The system sets production quotas, pricing, and import quotas on dairy, eggs, and poultry. Canadian politicians, including Quebec Premier Christine Fréchette, have indicated that dairy supply management is non-negotiable. The US tariff is set to take effect in August.

tech.title: Lego’s Donkey Kong arcade machine lets Mario jump endless barrels — Miyamoto is reportedly happy
tech.summary: A Lego Donkey Kong arcade machine has been created, priced at $200, featuring a working joystick and button to control Mario's movement and jumping. The game includes an endless series of barrels for Mario to jump, utilizing the same original barrels first released in 1989 for Lego's pirate sets. The machine is said to have won the favor of Mario creator Shigeru Miyamoto. The set's designer, Carl Merriam, has a history of creating nostalgic Lego sets.

tech.title: Google burning through cash with spiralling AI costs
tech.summary: Google's parent company Alphabet reported negative free cash flow of $5.9 billion for the first time in at least a decade, due to spiraling costs of artificial intelligence infrastructure. The company's AI spending is expected to reach $205 billion this year, up from $190 billion. This surge in costs comes as Alphabet's combined quarterly revenue hit $119.8 billion, a 23% increase from last year. The company's stock fell 4% in after-hours trading.

tech.title: Alphabet Quadruples Profit to $112 Billion, Fueled by A.I. Investments
tech.summary: Google’s parent company, which has spent heavily on artificial intelligence, also showed growth across its businesses, particularly in cloud computing.

crisis.title: China's Moonshot AI stole from Anthropic, Trump tech adviser says
crisis.summary: China's Moonshot AI has been accused of stealing capabilities from top US AI models, including Anthropic's Fable AI, through a process called distillation. US President Donald Trump's Science and Technology adviser Michael Kratsios claims Moonshot gained access to restricted Nvidia servers to train its models. The alleged theft occurred for the development of Moonshot's K3 model, which was unveiled last week and is said to rival top US technology. The US government is now investigating the claims.

crisis.title: Airport drop-off fees up by a third - here are the priciest
crisis.summary: Drop-off fees at the UK's major airports have risen by a third on average since last summer, with 16 of the 20 busiest airports increasing their fees. London's Gatwick and Stansted airports now charge £10 for drop-offs, with Gatwick limiting the time to 10 minutes and Stansted offering 15 minutes. This move is part of Gatwick's efforts to encourage passengers to use trains and buses. The airport aims to have 54% of passengers using public transport by the time its second runway is operational.

entertainment.title: Where to Find a Commonwealth Games 2026 Livestream in the U.S. to Watch the Event for Free
entertainment.summary: The 2026 Commonwealth Games will take place in Glasgow, Scotland from July 23 to August 2, featuring thousands of athletes from over 70 nations. The event will be livestreamed for free in the US on CBC, Canada's national public broadcaster, using a virtual private network like ExpressVPN or NordVPN. Viewers can set their location to Canada to access the stream. The Games will air live and as nightly highlights on various channels in Australia and the UK.

entertainment.title: Yeon Sang-ho Returns to ‘Parasyte’ Universe With ‘Tamiya,’ Starring Shioli Kutsuna, at Netflix
entertainment.summary: South Korean filmmaker Yeon Sang-ho is returning to the "Parasyte" universe with a new live-action series, "Parasyte: Tamiya," starring Shioli Kutsuna, set to stream on Netflix in 2027. The series marks a collaboration between Netflix and Yeon, who also co-wrote the script with Ryu Yong-jae. This is Yeon's latest project following "Hellbound" and "Parasyte: The Grey." The series is expected to premiere next year.

entertainment.title: Shaken, Soaked and Seasick: What It’s Like to Survive ‘The Odyssey’ in 4DX
entertainment.summary: A 3-hour screening of Christopher Nolan's "The Odyssey" in 4DX format left some viewers shaken and soaked. The immersive experience, featuring seat-rumbling and water-spritzing technology, is available at select theaters. Over 100 theaters worldwide have installed 4DX systems, offering a unique cinematic experience. Those who survived the ordeal reported seasick-like symptoms, a testament to the format's intense sensory stimulation.

politics.title: Republican Lawmaker Urges Charges Against Jack Smith
politics.summary: The criminal referral could provide a catalyst for a prosecution of Mr. Smith, who as special counsel became a top target of the president’s retribution campaign.

politics.title: House Passes Defense Bill Amid Iran War Divide
politics.summary: Republicans pushed through the $1.15 trillion bill over opposition from Democrats, who said backing it was akin to embracing the war.

politics.title: Clarity Act Mired In Debate Over Whether to Bar President From Selling Crypto
politics.summary: Democrats and Republicans are haggling about the Clarity Act, a major bill pushed by the crypto industry, as it moves closer to a Senate vote.

breaking.title: Three Airports Plan to Ditch T.S.A. Agents Amid Push for Private Security
breaking.summary: The airports have opted in to the agency’s new security model, an agency spokesperson confirmed on Wednesday. A union official said the move could jeopardize public safety.

breaking.title: Houthis Claim Strikes on 2 Saudi Oil Tankers in Red Sea
breaking.summary: The Saudi authorities had yet to confirm the hits, which would be the first attacks since the Iranian-backed Yemeni group announced a blockade on Saudi Arabia.

facts.title: Most sewage spills in England may be illegal, new research suggests
facts.summary: New research suggests that up to 86% of raw sewage spills in England may be illegal, with most occurring during non-heavy rain conditions. The analysis, covering over 350 storm overflow outlets, found that none of England's water companies performed well. The study's findings have significant implications for water companies serving over 30 million people. The UK's water regulator will likely face pressure to take action following these revelations.

facts.title: What Were the Lotus-Eaters Eating in Homer’s ‘Odyssey’?
facts.summary: In Homer’s epic, Odysseus’s men eat something so powerful that they forget about home. Which plants could have produced such a soporific, narcotic and amnesiac effect?

health.title: Hope for thousands of MS patients as 'life-changing' drug now on NHS in England
health.summary: A life-changing treatment for thousands of multiple sclerosis patients is now available on the NHS in England. Up to 5,000 people could benefit each year from the new drug, fampridine, which boosts nerve signals to aid mobility. This breakthrough could enable patients to walk independently and live more independently. The NHS will now provide this treatment, previously only accessible privately, to those in need.

health.title: Target ultra-processed food to reduce obesity in Britain | Letter
health.summary: A British health select committee report finds obesity is an engineered outcome, not a failure of willpower. The report highlights a flaw in decades of British food policy, specifically the "high in fat, salt or sugar" framework, which unfairly targets fat as a primary driver of weight gain. This framework has led to the replacement of fat with sugar in many products. The committee is now calling for a more targeted approach to reduce obesity in Britain.

sports.title: McInnes glad of Rangers backing in appeal against ban
sports.summary: Rangers manager Derek McInnes has received a four-match touchline ban for criticizing a late penalty decision in a May match against Motherwell. The ban is in addition to an immediate three-game suspension with one game held until the end of the season. McInnes and Rangers plan to appeal the decision, which they argue was directed at the specific call rather than a broader criticism of officials. The appeal will be a key development in the case.

sports.title: Tears and sleepless nights as Marshall and Adlington get Scotland flag honour
sports.summary: Scottish athletes Marshall and Adlington have been chosen to carry the Scotland flag at the Commonwealth Games. Marshall, a 59-year-old bowler, and Adlington, a 39-year-old judo gold medalist, will share the honor. The event is scheduled to take place at the Games, which will be a special moment for Marshall, who will be joined by his niece in the bowls team. The flag will be returned to the athletes after the ceremony, but they may have to compete for the first shot at it.

sports.title: Liverpool confident of signing Barcola - Thursday's gossip
sports.summary: Liverpool is confident of signing Paris St-Germain forward Bradley Barcola, a 23-year-old who impressed with four goal contributions at the World Cup with France this summer. The Reds aim to beat Arsenal and Bayern Munich to Barcola's signature. Talks are ongoing, but no official deal has been announced. The transfer would be a significant boost for Liverpool's attacking lineup.
